best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-registration-001 title: user successfully registers module: registration source pages: 2,3 preconditions: test data: - username: testuser - password: testpass123 - email: testuser@example.com test steps: 1. user navigates to the registration page. 2. user fills in the registration form with the provided test data. 3. user submits the form. 4. application sends a registration request to the server. 5. server processes the request and saves the user data. 6. server generates an otp and sends it to the user via email. 7. user receives the email and enters the otp. 8. server verifies the otp and completes the registration. expected result: user is successfully registered and redirected to the homepage.
